title: Add swipeable product photos with Lookout button linking to Meesho

requirements.text: Add the two uploaded product images (ms_qjphs_512_418433256.jpg and ms_cblw2_512_418433257.jpg) to the app as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated

quotes: Add this photo on swiping one comes other below it

acceptanceCriteria: Both uploaded images are saved in frontend/public/assets/generated
Images are accessible via relative paths from the frontend

requirements.text: Implement a swipeable photo interface where swiping transitions between the two Attack on Titan t-shirt product photos with one appearing below the other in a stacked layout

quotes: on swiping one comes other below it

acceptanceCriteria: Photos are displayed in a stacked vertical arrangement
Swiping left/right or up/down transitions between the two photos
Swipe gestures work on both touch and mouse interactions
Visual feedback indicates which photo is currently active

requirements.text: Add a 'Lookout' button to the swipeable photo interface that redirects users to the Meesho affiliate link: https://www.meesho.com/af_invite/234223027:instagram_stories:2007896?p_id=418433257&ext_id=6x4h61&utm_source=instagram_stories

quotes: add lookout button on clicking it redirect into https://www.meesho.com/af_invite/234223027:instagram_stories:2007896?p_id=418433257&ext_id=6x4h61&utm_source=instagram_stories

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Lookout' button is visible on or near the swipeable photo interface
Clicking the button opens the exact Meesho affiliate URL in a new tab
Button has clear, accessible styling consistent with the app design
URL parameters are preserved exactly as provided

requirements.text: Integrate the new swipeable photo interface into an appropriate location in the app, either as a new section on the ProductBrowse page or as a standalone route
acceptanceCriteria: The swipeable interface is accessible to users through the app navigation or prominent placement
Integration follows existing layout patterns and styling
Loading states are handled appropriately for the product images

constraints: Must preserve the exact Meesho affiliate URL with all query parameters
Use existing SwipeableGallery or useSwipeGesture patterns from the codebase
Follow the established design system with warm neutral palette
nonGoals: Modifying backend data models or adding product storage
Creating a full product management system for these specific photos
